reviews.review_description: Love it and it is daily I really wanted to play this on my phone but it cost 10.99 really yes really it’s fun idk if it works with wifi but I’m going to test that out
This little gem absolutely has a place in any puzzle heads library. Love it
I love to do wordle on my oculus threw the web now there’s an app yaaaay

I really enjoy this game. But only once a day is not enough. Will there ever be a time  that the game can be played continuously, that would be great.

Whoever is in charge or whoever reads this, please consider it. Put a price on it. Come on, I know you can do it.
Just don’t be greedy. It is a great game to play.

The game Wordle is great, especially for those people that like to think, but the problem that I have is that it's limited to only one challenge per day. While I understand that this is free, once you've gotten your guesses or solved it, you literally have to wait until the next day to play again. I'd rather pay for an actual version then this.

Quest wordle changed my life forever, and I don't know if I can ever go back. I already have 56 hours in the game simply staring at the results screen after 2 wordles. My wife left me, my dog died because I couldn't feed it, and my parents disowned me, but wordle on quest has patched that hole in my heart with a singular wordle a day. I think that this masterpiece of gaming history will forever change the VR industry, and there is much to be explored of this beautiful game that many AAA studios should look up to.
This game made me want to die and have stage 1000 cancer and puke pink milk shake chucks with expired rotten nasty milk
This game makes me want to smash my head onto the concrete. this app is so sticky it looks like a baby threw up moldy Cheerios all over it. It is goofier than goofy himself. 5 stars

reviews.review_title: What’s even the point of this
reviews.review_description: Exactly the same as the website, does nothing with VR. I guess it technically works so 2 stars.
It is literally wordel you can only use it once a day all it does is take up memory 😭😭😭
No VR effort at all lol. Not even full screen.
